text.title: ads-google-keywords Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-google-keywords as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ignoring the Search Terms report for weeks or months. New irrelevant searches accumulate and burn budget.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trending searches and user language evolve; weekly review catches waste early.

failure-mode.description: Setting bid-only campaigns to "set and forget" without optimization. Declining relevance and competitive pressure erode performance.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Campaigns need active management to maintain Quality Score and respond to market changes.
